title: Sabaody’s Cruel World

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey!! Help me!! What's going on!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You guys have got some weird powers!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yours is the weirdest of all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Looks like their reputations are well- deserved...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: gyaaahhh! His head was chopped off!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Wait, your body is over there, burning!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's hot! My body is hot!!
